nasb.text: If your offering is a grain offering made on the griddle, it shall be of fine flour, unleavened, mixed with oil;

esv.text: And if your offering is a grain offering baked on a griddle, it shall be of fine flour unleavened, mixed with oil.

cnv.text: 你的供物若是用煎盤上做的物作素祭，就要用調油的無酵細麵。

ccb.text: “如果献用平底锅烤的素祭，要献调油的无酵细面饼。
